step_rationale: Secondary bile acid metabolite reflecting altered bile acid and lipid metabolism; systemic metabolic response marker.
mechanism: Oxidized secondary bile acid reflecting perturbed hepatic lipid metabolism and systemic response to MI.

references.title: Acute myocardial infarction induces sex-specific, time-dependent remodeling of the gut microbiome and intestinal immune compartment in retired breeder C57BL/6N mice.
